summary: Comprehensive testing of Picks CRUD endpoints and Live Tracking UI. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: login flow, Whop link, tracking tab with Live/History toggle, pick cards with PROJ/LINE/CONF stats, SCHEDULED badge, delete functionality, and Auto 2m refresh badge.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check passed
Backend: POST /api/picks/save - saves pick and returns pickId
Backend: POST /api/picks/save with invalid session returns 401
Backend: POST /api/picks/list - returns all picks for user
Backend: POST /api/picks/list with invalid session returns 401
Backend: POST /api/picks/live-update - returns updates array
Backend: POST /api/picks/live-update with invalid session returns 401
Backend: POST /api/picks/delete - removes pick by pickId
Backend: POST /api/picks/delete with invalid session returns 401
Backend: Pick data persistence verified - all fields correctly saved and retrieved
Backend: Test cleanup completed
Frontend: Login page loads with Whop link (https://whop.com/checkout/plan_XZqvPZlrENzGt)
Frontend: Owner auto-login works (josselj001@gmail.com)
Frontend: Tracking tab shows Live/History toggle buttons
Frontend: Empty state shows 'No live picks being tracked'
Frontend: Saved picks render as cards with player name, team, venue
Frontend: Pick cards show PICK: OVER/UNDER {line} label
Frontend: Scheduled picks show PROJ/LINE/CONF stats grid
Frontend: SCHEDULED badge shown for non-live picks
Frontend: Prop type label (e.g., SHOTS) shown on cards
Frontend: Auto 2m badge shows when live picks exist
Frontend: Delete button removes picks from UI and database

test_credentials.owner_email: josselj001@gmail.com (auto-login via verify-whop, no password needed)

seed_data_creation: Test picks created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Picks CRUD and Live Tracking features fully tested. All endpoints work correctly: /api/picks/save, /api/picks/list, /api/picks/delete, /api/picks/live-update. Frontend tracking tab shows pick cards with SCHEDULED/LIVE/FINAL states, PROJ/LINE/CONF stats for scheduled picks, NOW/LINE/PACE/HIT% for live picks. Auto 2m refresh badge appears when live picks exist. Delete functionality works. Whop link on login page verified.

endpoints: POST /api/picks/save - saves pick to MongoDB, returns pickId
POST /api/picks/list - returns all picks for authenticated user
POST /api/picks/live-update - returns live match updates for picks

features: Pick cards with player name, team, venue
Auto 2m refresh badge when live picks exist
